scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/opencode build && bun run --cwd packages/pi build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/opencode typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/pi typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun test --isolate
